task: In Simple Calendar Pro, create a calendar event for tomorrow at 10h with the title 'Call with Alice' and the description 'We will celebrate contract details. Looking forward to productive discussions.'. The event should last for 45 mins.

steps.thought:
[Observation]
The current screen is the phone's home screen. Visible apps include Gmail, Photos, YouTube, Phone, Messages, Chrome, and another Gmail shortcut. The target app, "Simple Calendar Pro", is not visible on this main home screen page.

[Plan]
Step 1: Open Simple Calendar Pro app → | Step 2: Tap the add button to create a new event | Step 3: Fill in event details (title, time, duration, description) | Step 4: Save the event

[Decision]
Since the app "Simple Calendar Pro" is not visible on the current home screen page, I need to launch it using a system-level open action to proceed with creating the calendar event. I will initiate the opening of the Simple Calendar Pro app.

[Memory]
First action, no prior memory.

[Observation]
The screen displays the Simple Calendar Pro app in a monthly view for October. Today's date is highlighted as the 15th (Sunday). The floating action button '+' is visible in the bottom right corner.

[Plan Update]
Step 1: Open Simple Calendar Pro app ✓ | Step 2: Tap the add button to create a new event → | Step 3: Fill in event details (title, time, duration, description) | Step 4: Save the event

[Decision]
The current step in the plan requires initiating the creation of a new event. The target event is for "tomorrow" (which is October 16th, since today is the 15th). While I could select the date first, the standard way to start creating an event from this screen is by tapping the '+' button located at the bottom right. I will tap this button to proceed to the event creation screen.

[Memory]
Current date is October 15th. Target event date is tomorrow (October 16th). Event details: title 'Call with Alice', time 10:00, duration 45 mins, description 'We will celebrate contract details. Looking forward to productive discussions.'

[Observation]
The screen shows the Simple Calendar Pro app. After tapping the '+' button, a menu has popped up at the bottom right corner with two options: "Task" and "Event". The calendar view remains in the background, showing October.

[Reflection]
The previous plan assumed tapping '+' would directly lead to filling in event details (Step 3). Instead, a sub-menu appeared requiring a choice between creating a Task or an Event first.

[Replan]
Step 1: Open Simple Calendar Pro app ✓ | Step 2: Tap the add button ✓ | Step 3: Select 'Event' to proceed → | Step 4: Fill in event details (date tomorrow, time 10:00, duration 45 mins, title, description) | Step 5: Save the event

[Decision]
Based on the Replan, the current goal is to select 'Event' to enter the event creation screen. The "Event" button with a calendar icon is clearly visible at the bottom right. I will tap this button to continue.

[Memory]
Target event date: tomorrow (October 16th). Event details: title 'Call with Alice', time 10:00, duration 45 mins, description 'We will celebrate contract details. Looking forward to productive discussions.'

[Observation]
The screen is on the "New Event" creation page. The keyboard is active. The fields visible are "Title", "Location", and "Description". The current default date is set to "October 15 (Sun)" and time is 16:00.

[Plan Update]
Step 1-3: Navigate to Event creation ✓ | Step 4: Fill in event details (title, date tomorrow, time 10:00, duration 45 mins, description) → | Step 5: Save the event

[Decision]
Based on the Plan Update, I need to start filling in the event details. The first logical field is the title. According to my Memory, the target title is 'Call with Alice'. I will type this into the "Title" input field.

[Memory]
Target event date: tomorrow (October 16th). Event details remaining: time 10:00, duration 45 mins, description 'We will celebrate contract details. Looking forward to productive discussions.' Title 'Call with Alice' is currently being set.

[Observation]
The screen is on the "New Event" page. The title "Call with Alice" has been successfully entered in the title field. Below it are the "Location" and "Description" fields. The keyboard is still visible on the screen. The current date is set to October 15 (Sun) at 16:00.

[Plan Update]
Step 1-3: Navigate to Event creation ✓ | Step 4: Fill in event details (title ✓, date tomorrow, time 10:00, duration 45 mins, description →) | Step 5: Save the event

[Decision]
According to the Plan Update and Memory, the next detail to fill in is the description. The target description is 'We will celebrate contract details. Looking forward to productive discussions.'. I see the "Description" input field below the Location field. I will type the required text into this field.

arguments.text: We will celebrate contract details. Looking forward to productive discussions.

steps.thought:

The current start date is set to "October 15 (Sun)" at "16:00", and the end date is also "October 15 (Sun)" at "16:00". The keyboard is still open.

I will tap on this date field to change it.

I will tap on the end time field (the second "10:00" displayed on the screen) to open the time picker for the end time.

The clock dial is currently in hour selection mode, but since the hour is already correct (10), I need to switch to minute selection mode.
